---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What limitation, workflow gap, or user pain point does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the desired behavior.

## Affected Areas

- Authentication / Access
- User management
- General Ledger
- Reports
- Inventory
- Database / migrations
- Other:

## Acceptance Criteria

List the concrete outcomes that would make this complete.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or links if useful.
